summary.intent: Build a full browser-in-browser feature for the Moltis/Rex agent platform, enabling users to create, view, and interact with browser sessions through the UI, with live screencasting, mouse/keyboard input, URL autocomplete, session history, and per-agent cookie isolation.
summary.outcome: Successfully shipped 50+ commits implementing live CDP screencasting, full mouse/keyboard/scroll interaction, URL bar with Google autocomplete, SQLite-backed session history and action logs, per-agent browser profiles, tab-sharing within same-profile containers for cookie sharing, and numerous stability fixes around session lifecycle and relay task management.

repo: Biome version mismatch: `npx biome` is v0.3.3 but system `biome` (used by local-validate.sh) is v2.4.6 ‚Äî always use system biome for formatting
WebSocket broadcast has a subscription filter in broadcast.rs ‚Äî new event types must be added to the client subscription list in websocket.js or frames are silently dropped
BrowserManager uses lazy OnceCell initialization ‚Äî hooks registered at server startup before first use are never applied; must register inside the init closure
CDP `Page.startScreencast` relay task exits when `tx.send()` has zero receivers ‚Äî first CDP frame arrives before UI subscribes, causing permanent 'Waiting for first frame' state
Chrome SingletonLock is a symlink to container hostname; `exists()` returns false for dangling symlinks, so `symlink_metadata()` is required to detect and clean it
CDP `Input.dispatchMouseEvent` with type `mouseWheel` requires both `deltaX` and `deltaY` to be present even when zero ‚Äî omitting either causes CDP to reject the event
Same `profile_id` reuses existing browser container and creates a new tab (shared cookies); different profiles launch separate containers (isolated cookies)
Action name Display format includes parameters: `mouse_input(x=129, y=231)` not `mouse_input` ‚Äî `starts_with()` required for matching, not equality
CDP `EventFrameNavigated` fires on all frame navigations; filter by `frame.parent_id.is_none()` to get only top-level page navigations
screencast frame metadata includes `scroll_offset_y` ‚Äî eliminates need for `evaluate` polling for scroll position

code.finding: LLMs (MiniMax) send explicit `null` for all optional parameters; `obj.retain(|_, v| !v.is_null())` must be applied before serde deserialization to let `#[serde(default)]` work
Relay task must drop frames (not exit) when broadcast channel has zero receivers ‚Äî first CDP frame arrives before subscribers attach
`browser.screencast.frame` was missing from the event subscription list ‚Äî broadcast filter silently dropped all screencast frames
SingletonLock cleanup must use `symlink_metadata()` not `exists()` ‚Äî Chrome creates a symlink to container hostname that appears non-existent when container dies

Non-fatal action errors should not call `cleanup_stale_session` ‚Äî only navigate retry path should trigger cleanup; screenshot/scroll/keyboard/refresh failures should return errors without killing sessions
Canvas event listeners must use ref callback (fires on DOM element creation) not `useEffect([])` (runs once on mount when canvas may not exist yet due to conditional rendering)
BrowserService action hook must be stored on service and applied inside manager() OnceCell init closure ‚Äî registering at startup before first browser use means the hook is never set
Added `url: Option<String>` to ScreencastFrame populated from CDP `EventFrameNavigated` (filtered to top-level frames) ‚Äî eliminates get_url polling entirely
axum 0.8 uses `{param}` syntax not `:param` for path captures ‚Äî panics at startup with 'Path segments must not start with :'

workflow: YubiKey GPG signing cannot be done from background Bash tasks ‚Äî background commits reliably timeout; always run commits in foreground when YubiKey signature is required
When multiple relay tasks accumulate (one per session switch), WebSocket floods and UI freezes ‚Äî always check for existing screencast before calling start_screencast
CDP coordinate mapping must use `offsetX/offsetY` with `clientWidth/clientHeight` (excludes borders) not `clientX - rect.left` with `rect.width` (includes borders)
Profile lock conflicts cause parallel browser tests to fail ‚Äî use `--test-threads=1` or per-test temp profile directories
Chrome `--restore-session-cookies` flag needed for session cookies (like LinkedIn auth) to persist across container restarts ‚Äî without it only persistent cookies survive

friction: YubiKey GPG signing timeouts in background Bash tasks ‚Äî required multiple manual tap sequences and foreground retries throughout the session
Biome version mismatch (npx 0.3.3 vs system 2.4.6) caused repeated CI failures after `biome format --write` with wrong version appeared to succeed locally
CDP `mouseWheel` silently rejects events with missing deltaX/deltaY ‚Äî no error returned, scrolling just doesn't work
Apple Container networking occasionally produces `ERR_NETWORK_CHANGED` on first navigate in new containers
Relay task race condition (frames arrive before subscriber) was invisible ‚Äî 'Waiting for first frame' with no error logs
Action hook never firing because it was registered before manager lazy-init ‚Äî no errors, just silently no history recorded
Chrome SingletonLock as dangling symlink caused 60+ second Chrome startup timeout with no useful error message
Rapid screencast stop/start cycles during session switching overwhelmed CDP and crashed Chrome ‚Äî took multiple sessions to diagnose
open_items: WebRTC upgrade (neko architecture with GStreamer + VP8/VP9) for <100ms latency vs current 100-300ms CDP screencast
Binary WebSocket frames for screencast to eliminate ~33% base64 overhead
Container memory/disk usage display in Settings > Containers page
Comprehensive e2e test suite for all fixed regressions (cookie persistence, session lifecycle, screencast relay race, coordinate accuracy)
Session recording as video file for post-hoc review of agent browser activity
Per-container memory limits config option for Docker/Podman users (Apple Container handles this via VM pressure)
Playwright e2e tests currently untested in CI ‚Äî need server running; marked as manual-run only
Chrome stability with multiple heavy tabs (LinkedIn) in one container ‚Äî resource limits or process isolation may be needed for production use
